expected_action: allow reading generated translated documentation without modifying it
directive: Do not modify generated translated documentation under docs/ja/, docs/ko/, or docs/zh/; make documentation changes in the corresponding source docs outside those generated translation directories.

content: Check whether the Japanese index page is generated before I decide where to edit.

content.text: I can inspect the translated page for context, but I will not edit anything under docs/ja.
This is a translated docs file under docs/ja, so any content change should be made in the source docs path instead.
